entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for forage-linked morphological and biochemical traits.

entities.name: GREEN FORAGE YIELD
entities.description: A morphological trait measuring the yield of green forage per hectare.

entities.name: DRY FORAGE YIELD
entities.description: A morphological trait measuring the yield of dry forage per hectare.

entities.name: STOVER NITROGEN
entities.description: A quality trait measuring the nitrogen content in the stover of the plant.

entities.name: METABOLIZABLE ENERGY
entities.description: A biochemical quality trait measuring the energy available to the animal.

entities.name: IN VITRO ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A biochemical quality trait measuring the digestibility of organic matter in vitro.

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: A biochemical quality trait measuring the protein content of the forage.

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal environmental condition under which the pearl millet parents were evaluated.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group pearl millet hybrid parents into distinct clusters based on traits.

entities.name: POLLINATOR PARENTS
entities.description: A specific group of hybrid parents used in the breeding process.

entities.name: SEED PARENTS
entities.description: A specific group of hybrid parents used in the breeding process.

entities.name: FORAGE TRAITS
entities.description: The collective set of morphological and quality traits specific to forage production.
